failurePattern.description: API routes exist but are not registered in main server

triggerConditions.userFeedback: Now both feed and agents dont work. I will see the same errors. 'Error HTTP 404: Not Found' and no posts on the feed.
symptoms: Frontend loads but gets empty feed
Server logs show successful route registration but missing posts routes

claudeAnalysis.originalTask: Start backend and frontend servers for agent feed application
claudeAnalysis.claudeSolution: Started servers with proper logging and initialization
claudeAnalysis.actualResult: Servers start but critical API endpoints missing

rootCause.primary: Posts router exists at /src/api/routes/posts.ts but not imported/registered in simple-backend.js
rootCause.secondary: Route registration pattern inconsistency between different API endpoints
rootCause.technical: Express route mounting failure - posts router not included in app.use() statements

correctionRequired.action: Import and mount posts router in simple-backend.js
correctionRequired.location: simple-backend.js around line 400-500 where other routes are registered

tddFactor.recommendedTest: API endpoint availability test with curl/fetch validation
